content:
Anderson Bode, Alejandro Beaton, Xavier Carbaugh, Cathel Holden, Landon Miura (C+), Carter Olsen (C+), Thomas Osteen
Drop out? Tristan Branham, Anthony Marks, Ivan Marquez

Virtual machine - $.25 an hour

Compute instance - shut down after an hour - Create after no other changes

Sample data drop down automobile price

Right click on data - preview data (x-everything else y-price)

Split Data - double click - .5 -> .7 - 70 percent of the data is training data, 30 is test Random seed - 24 close split data

Train Model - Results data to dataset - Linear regression model plugged into other train model input - double click on train model - Label is target variable - edit column give column name of price 
 
Score model - trainded model in one slot, test data in the other slot

Name it RegressionModel 

Compute resource check to see if its online then click on submit

New experiment - (name) - auto price prediction - Next - Next - Compute Instance - should see your running compute instance - refresh if you dont might fix it - Next - Submit 

- View details on top after 10 to 15 seconds or go to job page

- Clean Missing Data - delete link between data and split and insert the cleaning step. double click select the columns to clean (normalized losses) - Cleaning mode (replace with mean) 

Evaluate Model put it at the end - submit
